AI Mode
✅

Bot is Live

Your WhatsApp bot is online and accepting commands.

Scan QR Code

Open WhatsApp → Settings → Linked Devices → Link a Device → scan this code

or use phone number pairing below
Connect Bot to WhatsApp
1

Get a number ready

Your bot needs its own WhatsApp number — a second SIM, virtual number, or any number that has WhatsApp installed. This is the number the bot will use to send and receive messages.

2

Enter the bot's phone number

Include country code, digits only. Example: 2349012345678 for a Nigerian number.

3

Enter the code in WhatsApp

After you click "Get Pairing Code", an 8-digit code will appear below. Open WhatsApp on the bot's phone and enter it.

Your pairing code — valid for ~60 seconds
—
1. Open WhatsApp on the bot's phone
2. Tap ⋮ (menu) → Linked Devices
3. Tap Link a Device
4. Tap "Link with phone number instead"
5. Enter the code above exactly as shown
6. Done — bot is now live ✅

Once linked, the bot runs independently. You don't need the phone nearby — it handles everything on its own.

or scan QR code above if available
📣 Auto-Message Campaign
👥 Contacts
🚀 Send Campaign
📊 Progress

Paste phone numbers below — one per line. Optional: Name, Number or Number, Name format to personalise messages with {name}.

Tip: Use {name} in your message and the bot will replace it with each person's name.

Write the message the bot will send to each contact. Use {name} for personalisation.

Messages are sent with a 4–9 second random delay between each one to keep the account safe.
Total: 0 Sent: 0 Failed: 0 Status: Idle
No campaign run yet.
Session Control

Logout wipes the current session. You'll need to re-pair with WhatsApp after.
